name: Marshall Gilkes
abstract: Marshall Gilkes (born September 30, 1978) is an American jazz trombonist and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Ellen Rowe
about_quotes.evidence: I think in order to be one of those players that’s going to have those tracks sent to them, like a Randy Brecker or Marshall Gilkes or whoever it might be, you have to be at the very top of your game still.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellen Rowe interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 2, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Mike Davis
about_quotes.evidence: I’m actually working on a new series... we’re starting with Mike Rodriguez and Marshall Gilkes. They — we send them the rhythm tracks... and then we’re transcribing all their solos
about_quotes.doc_title: Mike Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Reggie Watkins
about_quotes.evidence: I met — re-connected with Andre there, re-connected with Steve Davis, Elliot Mason was a competitor, Marshall Gilkes, all these great trombone players.
about_quotes.doc_title: Reggie Watkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018
